titleStmt.title: SII 12.114: original edition by V. Venkatasubba Ayyar
No. 114. (A.R. No. 152 of 1916). KĪḺPULAM, ARKONAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE K4AILĀSANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This record registers a gift of land made in the 2nd year of Vayiramēgavarman by Muḷḷikkuḍaiyāṉ Ādittaṉāḷi for conducting the tiruppali (i.e., śrībali) ceremony and for offerings during the three services in the temple of Tirukkūḷīchcharattu-Āḷvār at Palkalam in Dāmar-kōṭṭam, with five persons including one for beating the gong (śēgaṇḍigai) and two for blowing the trumpets (kāḷam). The assembly (ūr) of Palkalam entrusted the endowed land to Arayaṇichchiṅgaṉ, a drummer (uvaichchaṉ) residing in the village.
The village Palkalam may be identified with Kīḻpulam itself.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .
śrī vayirame kapanma ṟku yāṇṭu
2Āvatu tāmarkkoṭṭattup palkalattut tirukkūḷiccara
ttu Āḷvārkku Ivvūril muḷḷikkuṭai [yāThe letter yā is engraved below the line.]ṉ Ātittaṉāḷi Itte
varkku tiruppaṇi muṉṟu
tecakālamum cekaṇṭi
kai Uṭpaṭa Ai
ñcāḷ koṇṭu ti
ruppali koṭṭuvataṟ
ku vaitta nilam
lli Uḻuvāṉeṉṟa ceṟuvum
Ūruvatiyeṉṟa ceṟuvum Iv
vūril Uvaiccar kuriyatu Eppo
rpaṭṭatum koṇṭu Ivvūril Ara
yaṇicciṅka Uvaiccaṉ koṭṭuvatāka vait to
m palkalattūrom . Ivanukku Eppeṟp paṭṭa sa ma
paricāram vaitto
m Innilattukku Eruma
mañciyu Ivaṉey cey
tukoṇṭu Orāḷinīr muṟai
toṟu maṭaittukkoḷvatāka vai
ttom Ittirukkoyiluṭaiya kū
ḷicivaṉum Ivaṉtampi maticūta
civaṉum muṉṟu tecakālamum tiruvamu
tu kāṭṭi Iraṇṭāḷk kāḷa mu
tuvārkaḷākavum vaittom palkalattūrom .
Itdhanmam rakṣi ppār tiruppātameṉ ta(i)lai melaṉa . Itdhanmam Aḻittār keṅkāk kanyā
n=tara ttuc ceytār ceyta pāvattup paṭu vār . Ivai
kaṟṟaḷip peruntaēngraved as a group letter.ccaṉ makaṉ Iḷaṅkāva ṉeḻuttu . CHANDRADITYA
Digital edition of SII 12.114 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
